name: releases
description: Changelog indexer and registry for AI agents and developers

scripts.dev:web: cd web && portless run --name ${PORTLESS_NAME:-releases} sh -c 'bun run dev -- --port $PORT'
scripts.dev:api: portless run --name api.${PORTLESS_NAME:-releases} sh -c 'wrangler dev --config workers/api/wrangler.jsonc --port $PORT --ip 127.0.0.1'
scripts.dev:discovery: portless run --name discovery.${PORTLESS_NAME:-releases} sh -c 'wrangler dev --config workers/discovery/wrangler.jsonc --port $PORT --ip 127.0.0.1'
scripts.dev:mcp: portless run --name mcp.${PORTLESS_NAME:-releases} sh -c 'wrangler dev --config workers/mcp/wrangler.jsonc --port $PORT --ip 127.0.0.1'
scripts.mcp:ui:build: cd workers/mcp/ui && bun install --silent && bun run build
scripts.mcp:ui:build:dev: cd workers/mcp/ui && bun install --silent && NODE_ENV=development bun run build
scripts.mcp:ui:watch: cd workers/mcp/ui && bun install --silent && bun run build:watch
scripts.mcp:inspect:staging: sh -c 'test -n "$STAGING_ACCESS_KEY" || { echo "Set STAGING_ACCESS_KEY in .env" >&2; exit 1; }; npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector npx mcp-remote https://mcp-staging.releases.sh/mcp --header "X-Releases-Staging-Key: $STAGING_ACCESS_KEY"'
scripts.deploy:mcp: bun run mcp:ui:build && wrangler deploy --config workers/mcp/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:api && bun run deploy:discovery && bun run deploy:mcp
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply released-db --local --config workers/api/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply released-db --remote --config workers/api/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:pull: rm -rf workers/api/.wrangler/state/v3/d1 && wrangler d1 export released-db --remote --no-schema --table organizations --table org_accounts --table sources --table releases --table usage_log --table fetch_log --table ignored_urls --output /tmp/releases-d1-export.sql --config workers/api/wrangler.jsonc && bun run db:migrate:local && sqlite3 $(find workers/api/.wrangler -name '*.sqlite' | head -1) < /tmp/releases-d1-export.sql && rm /tmp/releases-d1-export.sql
